requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence - VBSI, URA, UNELCO, VUI, and Project Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——VBSI、URA、UNELCO、VUI及项目审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——VBSI、URA、UNELCO、VUI及項目審查

summary.en: Vanuatu has limited publicly confirmed national PV-inverter product standards, so safety acceptance is normally shaped by VBSI standards context, URA-regulated utility review, UNELCO / VUI connection requirements, project-owner specifications, French / IEC legacy practice, and lender or EPC requirements. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, the practical safety baseline expected by utilities, EPCs, lenders, insurers, and project owners is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the inverter model or model family. Vanuatu's tropical maritime and cyclone-prone environment also makes the safety file more than an electrical shock file: it should document IP rating, humidity and temperature operating limits, corrosion controls, terminal and enclosure materials, surge protection coordination, spares, and installation constraints for salt-mist coastal sites and cyclone-rated mounting.
summary.zh: 瓦努阿图公开确认的国家光伏逆变器产品标准有限，因此安全接受通常受VBSI标准背景、URA监管下的公用事业审查、UNELCO / VUI接入要求、项目业主规格、法国/IEC传统实践以及融资方或EPC要求影响。对于并网太阳能光伏逆变器，公用事业、电力工程承包商、融资方、保险方和项目业主通常期待的实际安全基准是覆盖逆变器型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据。瓦努阿图热带海洋且易受气旋影响的环境也意味着安全文件不应只覆盖电击风险：还应记录IP等级、湿度和温度运行限值、防腐蚀控制、端子和外壳材料、浪涌保护配合、备件，以及适用于盐雾沿海地点和抗气旋安装的限制。
summary.zht: 萬那杜公開確認的國家光伏逆變器產品標準有限，因此安全接受通常受VBSI標準背景、URA監管下的公用事業審查、UNELCO / VUI接入要求、項目業主規格、法國/IEC傳統實務以及融資方或EPC要求影響。對於併網太陽能光伏逆變器，公用事業、電力工程承包商、融資方、保險方和項目業主通常期待的實際安全基準是覆蓋逆變器型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據。萬那杜熱帶海洋且易受氣旋影響的環境也意味著安全文件不應只覆蓋電擊風險：還應記錄IP等級、濕度和溫度運行限值、防腐蝕控制、端子和外殼材料、浪湧保護配合、備件，以及適用於鹽霧沿海地點和抗氣旋安裝的限制。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Vanuatu Bureau of Standards and Industry (VBSI) standards context
Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA) electricity-sector regulatory context
UNELCO / VUI utility and project technical review context

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic voluntary CQC or CGC certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These files may demonstrate China-market conformity but are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates requested in Vanuatu project procurement, UNELCO / VUI utility review, or URA-facing grid-connection submissions. China documentation also often assumes domestic environmental and installation conditions, and may not cover Vanuatu-specific cyclone, high-humidity, salt-mist, remote-serviceability, and elevated ambient-temperature derating risks.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内自愿性CQC或CGC认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件可以证明中国市场合规，但不会自动替代瓦努阿图项目采购、UNELCO / VUI公用事业审查或面向URA的并网提交中要求的IEC 62109-1/-2证书。中国文件也通常假设国内环境和安装条件，可能未覆盖瓦努阿图特有的气旋、高湿、盐雾、远程可维护性和高环境温度降额风险。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內自願性CQC或CGC認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件可以證明中國市場合規，但不會自動替代萬那杜項目採購、UNELCO / VUI公用事業審查或面向URA的併網提交中要求的IEC 62109-1/-2證書。中國文件也通常假設國內環境和安裝條件，可能未覆蓋萬那杜特有的氣旋、高濕、鹽霧、遠端可維護性和高環境溫度降額風險。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary China-market PV inverter certification schemes

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the specific inverter model or family supplied to Vanuatu. Exporters should confirm whether the buyer, UNELCO, VUI, URA-facing reviewer, EPC, lender, or insurer requires ILAC-accredited reports, and should add environmental design evidence for coastal corrosion, humidity, enclosure sealing, surge withstand, ventilation, cyclone-resistant installation, and serviceability after sea freight through Port Vila. Where an inverter model is reconfigured from a China-market firmware profile to Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz profile, the safety and operating-limit documentation should identify that configuration.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全证据应补充覆盖供应至瓦努阿图的具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告。出口商应确认买方、UNELCO、VUI、面向URA的审查方、EPC、融资方或保险方是否要求ILAC认可报告，并增加沿海腐蚀、湿度、外壳密封、浪涌耐受、通风、抗气旋安装以及经维拉港海运后的可维护性环境设计证据。若逆变器型号从中国市场固件配置改为瓦努阿图230/400 V、50 Hz配置，安全和运行限值文件应识别该配置。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全證據應補充覆蓋供應至萬那杜的具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告。出口商應確認買方、UNELCO、VUI、面向URA的審查方、EPC、融資方或保險方是否要求ILAC認可報告，並增加沿海腐蝕、濕度、外殼密封、浪湧耐受、通風、抗氣旋安裝以及經維拉港海運後的可維護性環境設計證據。若逆變器型號從中國市場韌體配置改為萬那杜230/400 V、50 Hz配置，安全和運行限值文件應識別該配置。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice for utility, EPC, lender, insurer, or owner acceptance of Vanuatu grid-connected PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary China-market PV inverter certification evidence does not automatically transfer to Vanuatu IEC 62109 project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, or domestic voluntary certification alone for Vanuatu PV inverter safety review. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for the supplied model and document Vanuatu-specific environmental controls for cyclone exposure, humidity, salt mist, surge protection, sea-freight handling, remote serviceability, and thermal derating before shipment or project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004或国内自愿性认证完成瓦努阿图光伏逆变器安全审查。出货或项目提交前，应为所供应型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2证据，并记录适用于瓦努阿图的气旋暴露、湿度、盐雾、浪涌保护、海运处理、远程可维护性和热降额环境控制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004或國內自願性認證完成萬那杜光伏逆變器安全審查。出貨或項目提交前，應為所供應型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2證據，並記錄適用於萬那杜的氣旋暴露、濕度、鹽霧、浪湧保護、海運處理、遠端可維護性和熱降額環境控制。
